name: PipelineTerraformDocs
description: Generate documentation for Terraform modules using terraform-docs
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: formatter
inputs.label: Output format
inputs.helpMarkDown: The terraform-docs formatter to run. Determines the generated documentation format.

inputs.name: modulePath
inputs.label: Module directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: The directory containing the Terraform module to document. terraform-docs scans this path. Defaults to the repository root.

inputs.name: outputFile
inputs.label: Output file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional file (relative to the module directory) to write the documentation to, e.g. README.md. When empty, the output is written to the console.

inputs.name: outputMode
inputs.label: Output mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: How to write the output file. 'inject' updates content between the terraform-docs markers; 'replace' overwrites the whole file.

inputs.name: outputCheck
inputs.label: Check only (fail if out of date)
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, terraform-docs does not write the file; it fails the task if the output file is out of date. Useful as a CI gate to enforce that committed documentation is current.

inputs.name: configFile
inputs.label: Config file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional path to a terraform-docs configuration file (e.g. .terraform-docs.yml).

inputs.name: sortBy
inputs.label: Sort by
inputs.helpMarkDown: Sort the documented inputs/outputs by the given criteria. 'default' leaves terraform-docs' default ordering.

inputs.name: recursive
inputs.label: Recursive
inputs.helpMarkDown: Recursively generate documentation for submodules found under the module directory.

inputs.name: recursivePath
inputs.label: Recursive submodule path
inputs.helpMarkDown: The submodule directory (relative to the module directory) to recurse into when 'Recursive' is enabled.

inputs.name: additionalArgs
inputs.label: Additional arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional command-line arguments passed verbatim to terraform-docs (e.g. --hide-empty --show inputs).

outputVariables.name: generatedFilePath
outputVariables.description: The path to the generated documentation file, when an output file was configured.
